creator: rvaitelis@yahoo.com
text:
Unable to boot the system with the generic kernel. Fatal kernel trap: trap entry = 0x2 (memory management fault), a0=0x60, a1=0x1, a2=0x0, pc=0xfffffc0000521f90, ra=0xfffffc0000541b88, curproc=0

Fix: 

not available
How-To-Repeat: boot from installation cd with generic kernel and pci_parity set to "off"
